title: Hakone Eva Map
wikitext:
[]: Hakone Eva Map             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jul 22, 2009 12:35 pm http://event.hakone.or.jp/present/index.html Looks pretty cool, SSD is making a news post about it with a picture.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Wed Jul 22, 2009 12:46 pm "What? What is this?"

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jul 22, 2009 12:49 pm Here ya go: http://www.evageeks.org/2009/07/evangelion-map-of-hakone/ I'd like to get my hands on this... oh well.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jul 22, 2009 1:17 pm It's too bad rockthing isn't in Japan atm (he went to see that eclipse), or I'd get him to, wait. Maybe I'll just use his address.

[]:             Quote Post by Barong » Wed Jul 22, 2009 3:57 pm Axell wrote: "What? What is this?"

[]:             Quote Post by Marduk » Wed Jul 22, 2009 4:04 pm Barong wrote: "What is it?"

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Wed Jul 22, 2009 5:03 pm Barong wrote: Axell wrote: "What? What is this?"

[]:             Quote Post by trueno_twentyone » Thu Jul 23, 2009 12:27 am Electric Sachiel wrote: The ruse? Well if you guys don't know it already, the site of fictional Tokyo-3 is actually located in Hakone-a hot springs community a few hours outside of present day Tokyo. So all the mountains, places where the schools, Rei's apartment, Nerv HQ, Shinji's school, the location of Misato's apartment, the shrine where Kensuke and Toji witness Unit 01 fighting Shamshel, the location and the place for the Ramiel battle, all those a marked on a handy dandy map with comparison shots of the real life sites for these events or places in the anime.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Thu Jul 23, 2009 12:57 am I knew i recognized hakone from something. Boo to all of you that didnt get the resident evil reference

[]:             Quote Post by Lagann » Mon Jan 31, 2011 1:19 pm After about two years of the map being out and no scans online, the Hakone website finally released the map in pdf format on this page. http://www.hakone.or.jp/blog/special-feature/eva_index.html

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jan 31, 2011 1:45 pm It was a little confusing with information of the new and old maps on the same page, but yeah, those do look like scans of the old map. (Anyway, I like how the new map/poster features Rei in a kimono. It reminds me of this one NGE image of her standing in a kimono with the moon outside.)

[]: HAKONE EVANGELION MAP             Quote Post by symbv » Wed Feb 02, 2011 11:49 am As you know, the Neo-Tokyo is located in the area of Hakone. Now Hakone tourist association has started a PR drive in joint effort with Gainax to promote Evangelion "sacred site pilgrimmage": http://www.hakone.or.jp/blog/special-feature/eva_index.html You can download the following map and made a Hakone Evangelion Map yourself and start your own Evangelion pilgrimmage now! http://www.hakone.or.jp/blog/special-feature/pdf/mru.pdf http://www.hakone.or.jp/blog/special-feature/pdf/mrd.pdf http://www.hakone.or.jp/blog/special-feature/pdf/mlu.pdf http://www.hakone.or.jp/blog/special-feature/pdf/mld.pdf http://www.hakone.or.jp/blog/special-feature/pdf/kru.pdf http://www.hakone.or.jp/blog/special-feature/pdf/krd.pdf http://www.hakone.or.jp/blog/special-feature/pdf/klu.pdf http://www.hakone.or.jp/blog/special-feature/pdf/kld.pdf

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Feb 02, 2011 11:56 am Put Rei on anything and you have a money printer

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Wed Feb 02, 2011 12:17 pm Hey, it has Rei in a yukata printed on it! Sometimes I think that Anno just said "fuck it, do what the fuck you want with my bishoujo deconstruction, I don´t care anymore".

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Wed Feb 02, 2011 12:45 pm Actually there is another version with Asuka in yukata too, but Rei may have got the limelight... http://www.hakone.or.jp/blog/special-feature/eva2_index.html

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Feb 02, 2011 12:51 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: Hey, it has Rei in a yukata printed on it!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Feb 02, 2011 1:48 pm Merged with the thread in the Rebuild section.

[]:             Quote Post by Norsehound » Thu Feb 03, 2011 8:05 pm Keh, I'd rather have the full map in one sheet. It's worth noting that some of the locations on the Hakone map are different from...well... other sources I've found here on Evageeks. One thing I recall is that Misato and Rei's apartments are depicted on the east side of the city in the Hakone Map, but in other places they're found in the west. Oh, and y'know an English version of the map exists too. At least that's what that blog suggests. Edit: Well, found this from a discussion on Tokyo-3 maps and making a minecraft pic out of them. Ayanami's place and Misato's place are in the west, contrast to the eastern placement in the Hakone map.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Feb 03, 2011 8:36 pm Whoa, that is awesome. (By the way, according to the NGE episode 04 script, where Shinji is sitting at Owakudani is "a spot famous for suicides". >_>; ) Thanks so much for the information, I didn't even know an English map existed! I wonder if they'll make an English version for the new (2011) map, too?

[]:             Quote Post by Norsehound » Thu Feb 03, 2011 10:51 pm the blog wrote: These English version maps are quite difficult to get a hold of unless you live in Japan. At Hakone Yumoto station, you have to ask for them at the tourist information building. They keep them behind the counter (and hidden from view) and make you fill in a paper saying where you are from and the length of your stay in Hakone.
